title: census loop sleeps BEFORE first ping, then indefinitely
description: In server.rs the census background task does: sleep(7 days) → loop { ping; sleep(7 days) }. The first ping fires after 7 days. If the server is restarted weekly (e.g. for updates) the census ping never fires. The intent is clearly weekly pings; the structure should be: loop { ping; sleep(7 days) }. The pre-loop sleep is wrong control flow that makes the first ping unreachable under normal ops cadence.
close_reason: Duplicate of broadside-zzj3.1 (same census sleep-before-first-ping finding).
